package WurstExportedObjects_w3u
import ObjEditingNatives
import UnitObjEditing

// Modified Table (contains all custom objects)

@compiletime function create_w3u_hchs()
	new UnitDefinition('hchs', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Hero Chooser")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E000()
	new HeroDefinition('E000', 'Ewar')
	..setTeamColor(0)
	..setNormalAbilities("AInv,Ault")
	..setAbilitySkinList("AInv,Ault")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n000()
	new UnitDefinition('n000', 'nkob')
	..setAttack1AnimationBackswingPoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1AnimationDamagePoint(0.0)
	..setAttack1CooldownTime(0.0)
	..setAttack1DamageBase(0)
	..setAttack1DamageNumberofDice(0)
	..setAttack1DamageSidesperDie(0)
	..setAttack1MaximumNumberofTargets(0)
	..setAttack1Range(0)
	..setAttack1RangeMotionBuffer(0.0)
	..setAttack2MaximumNumberofTargets(0)
	..setAttacksEnabled(0)
	..setSpeedBase(0)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(20000)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(300.0)
	..setName("KoboldThemedTargetDummy")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n001()
	new UnitDefinition('n001', 'nech')
	..setSpeedBase(0)
	..setSpeedMinimum(0)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(500.0)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(20000)
	..setName("ChickenThemedTargetDummy")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E001()
	new HeroDefinition('E001', 'Ecen')
	..setHeroAbilities("")
	..setName("Cenarius")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setString("uhas", "")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n002()
	new UnitDefinition('n002', 'nfac')
	..setName("Goblin Factory")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e002()
	new UnitDefinition('e002', 'efon')
	..setNormalAbilities("A000,Ault")
	..setUpgradesUsed("R000,Reuv,Renb")
	..setFoodCost(2)
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(425)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(1.0)
	..setAttack1CooldownTime(1.45)
	..setSpeedBase(240)
	..setGoldCost(130)
	..setBuildTime(20)
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("Train Treant")
	..setTooltipExtended("Basic frontline unit. Can learn Thicker Bark to resist some damage and Recycle to invigorate a nearby unit on death. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setHotkey("Q")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0h")


@compiletime function create_w3u_E003()
	new HeroDefinition('E003', 'Edem')
	..setHeroAbilities("A002")
	..setAttack1WeaponSound("RockHeavyBash")
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(3.0)
	..setPrimaryAttribute("STR")
	..setStartingStrength(25)
	..setStrengthPerLevel(4.0)
	..setIntelligencePerLevel(1.7)
	..setAgilityPerLevel(2.0)
	..setStartingAgility(18)
	..setName("Ursoc")
	..setModelFile("units\\creeps\\GrizzlyBear\\GrizzlyBear.mdl")
	..setTintingColorRed(120)
	..setTintingColorGreen(120)
	..setTintingColorBlue(120)
	..setProperNames("Ursoc")
	..setTooltipAwaken("Revive Ursoc")
	..setTooltipBasic("Summon Ursoc")
	..setTooltipExtended("Ancient Wild God of the forest, Ursoc is a relentless warrior who crushes his enemies with overwhelming strength and primal fury. Has Cleave, [Spell], [Spell][Spell], and [Ultimate]. |n|n|cffffcc00Attacks land units.|r")
	..setTooltipRevive("Revive Ursoc")
	..setIconScoreScreen("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNGrizzlyBear.blp")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNGrizzlyBear.blp")
	..setProperNamesUsed(1)
	..setNormalAbilities("A001,AInv,Ault")
	..setHeroAbilities("AM0b,A002,AM0a,AHav")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e004()
	new UnitDefinition('e004', 'edry')
	..setManaInitialAmount(150)
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)
	..setName("DryadCaster")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\SylvanEnchantress.mdl")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0d,AInv,Ault,ACm2,Aien,Aadm,Aspo")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e005()
	new BuildingDefinition('e005', 'edob')
	..setName("Sentinel Embassy")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETownhall.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_n003()
	new BuildingDefinition('n003', 'nfoh')
	..setName("Fountain of Blood")
	..setTintingColorGreen(50)
	..setTintingColorBlue(50)


@compiletime function create_w3u_o000()
	new BuildingDefinition('o000', 'owtw')
	..setName("GoblinTower")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinTowerInduwer.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_o001()
	new BuildingDefinition('o001', 'obar')
	..setName("GoblinBarracks")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinBarracks.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_o002()
	new BuildingDefinition('o002', 'ogre')
	..setName("GoblinTownhall")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\GoblinOutpost.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h000()
	new BuildingDefinition('h000', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Mount Hyjal")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")
	..setModelFile("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h001()
	new BuildingDefinition('h001', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Mount Hyjal Grove")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")
	..setModelFile("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h003()
	new BuildingDefinition('h003', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Mount Hyjal Town")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")
	..setModelFile("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_h004()
	new BuildingDefinition('h004', 'hhou')
	..setPlacementRequires("")
	..setPathingMap("")
	..setName("Bloodmyst Isle")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNCOP.blp")
	..setModelFile("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setArtSpecial("buildings\\other\\CircleOfPower\\CircleOfPower.mdl")
	..setUseClickHelper(true)
	..setGroundTexture("")

	..setGroundTexture("")

@compiletime function create_w3u_e00B()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00B', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("e00I")
	..setName("TowerTest")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00I()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00I', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("e00F")
	..setName("TowerTest1")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")
	..setRequiredAnimationNames("upgrade,first")

	new BuildingDefinition('e00F', 'etol')
	..setUpgradesTo("")
	..setName("TowerTest2")
	..setModelFile("war3mapImported\\NETByQ1.mdl")
	..setRequiredAnimationNames("upgrade,second")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00E()
	new UnitDefinition('e00E', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Explosives")
	..setModelFile("Units\\Other\\TNTBarrel\\TNTBarrel.mdl")


@compiletime function create_w3u_N006()
	new HeroDefinition('N006', 'Nmsr')
	..setHeroAbilities("")
	..setHitPointsMaximumBase(5000)
	..setHitPointsRegenerationRate(3.0)
	..setManaRegeneration(7.0)
	..setName("Xavius")
	// TODO no wrapper: 	..setString("uhas", "")
	..setProperNames("Xavius")
	..setModelFile("xavius2.mdl")
	..setNormalAbilities("AM04,AM05,AM02")
	..setLevel(6)
	..setName("Xavius")


@compiletime function create_w3u_e00J()
	new BuildingDefinition('e00J', 'eshy')
	..setScalingValue(2.0)


@compiletime function create_w3u_x001()
	new UnitDefinition('x001', 'ewsp')
	..setName("Dummy Caster")
	..setManaMaximum(1000000)
	..setMovementType("fly")
	..setUpgradesUsed("")
	..setStructuresBuilt("")
	..setRace("commoner")
	..setFoodCost(0)
	..setArmorType("divine")
	..setIconGameInterface("ReplaceableTextures\\CommandButtons\\BTNtemp.blp")
	..setSpeedBase(522)
	..setModelFile("dummy.mdl")
	..setAnimationBlendTimeseconds(0.0)
	..setAnimationCastBackswing(0.0)
	..setMaximumPitchAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setMaximumRollAngledegrees(0.0)
	..setTurnRate(3.0)
	..setArtSpecial("")
	..setProjectileImpactZ(0.0)
	..setProjectileLaunchZ(0.0)
	..setNameEditorSuffix("(Basics)")
	..setSightRadiusDay(1)
	..setSightRadiusNight(1)
	..setUnitClassification("_")
	..setPropulsionWindowdegrees(1.0)
	..setTooltipBasic("")
	..setNormalAbilities("Aloc,Agho")
	..setCollisionSize(0.0)


// Original Table (contains all modified default/melee objects)
// These are emitted when createObjectDefinition uses the same base/new id.

@compiletime function create_w3u_hpea()
	new UnitDefinition('hpea', 'hpea')
	..setShadowImageUnit("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_eaom()
	new BuildingDefinition('eaom', 'eaom')
	..setResearchesAvailable("R000,Resc,Reib,Remk,Remg,Repb")
	..setUnitsTrained("e002,e004,edry")


@compiletime function create_w3u_ndru()
	new BuildingDefinition('ndru', 'ndru')
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_nmoo()
	new BuildingDefinition('nmoo', 'nmoo')
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_nfoh()
	new BuildingDefinition('nfoh', 'nfoh')
	..setGroundTexture("")


@compiletime function create_w3u_eate()
	new BuildingDefinition('eate', 'eate')
	..setUnitsTrained("E003,Edem,Ekee,Emoo,Ewar")


@compiletime function create_w3u_edry()
	new UnitDefinition('edry', 'edry')
	..setCollisionSize(8.0)


@compiletime function create_w3u_Ekee()
	new HeroDefinition('Ekee', 'Ekee')
	..setNormalAbilities("AM07,AInv,Ault")
	..setHeroAbilities("AM08,AM09,AM06")


@compiletime function create_w3u_Hblm()
	new HeroDefinition('Hblm', 'Hblm')
	..setNormalAbilities("AM0e")
	..setLevel(6)
	..setName("Ligga")
